About the Project

Nature Woods — The Green Farms

"The best things in life are free — at Nature Woods, we are driven by the belief that true happiness and peace of mind come from the simple joys of life."

MARS GROUP (MARS INFRA) presents Nature Woods — a large, thoughtfully planned commercial and residential plotted township on the Ayodhya Highway at Lashkar Bazar, just 15 km from Kisan Path. Dedicated to delivering a living experience that is hassle-free, pristine, well-organized, and sustainable, this is more than a plot — it's a sanctuary.

Located on the highway itself — left side from Lucknow, right side from Gorakhpur — Nature Woods enjoys unmatched visibility and access. Approved by the District Panchayat, the project features an 80-foot grand entrance gate, 40-ft and 30-ft wide internal roads, and multiple landscaped parks throughout the community.

At the heart of the township sits a world-class Club House with a banquet hall, gymnasium, community centre, lush green lawn, and a dedicated indoor games zone featuring snooker, chess, table tennis, and carom. Nature Woods stands as a testament to a harmonious blend of aesthetics, practicality, and sustainability.

Project Type

Commercial & Residential Plots

Location

Lashkar Bazar, Ayodhya Highway, UP

Distance from Kisan Path

Only 15 km

Approval

District Panchayat Approved

EMI Plan

Developer

MARS Group (MARS INFRA)

Why Choose This Project

Key Highlights

Ayodhya Highway Frontage

A highway-facing project on the Ayodhya Highway — left side from Lucknow, right from Gorakhpur. Exceptional visibility, footfall, and long-term appreciation potential.

80-Ft Grand Entrance Gate

A magnificent 80-foot-wide gated entrance — announcing the scale and security of this premium plotted township with 24/7 controlled access.

District Panchayat Approved

A large project officially approved by the District Panchayat — fully compliant, legally secured, and safe for end-users and investors alike.

Wide Internal Roads

40-foot and 30-foot wide internal roads throughout the township — ensuring smooth traffic flow, accessibility, and a premium township feel.

Multiple Landscaped Parks

Lush landscaped parks distributed throughout the township — park-facing plot options available for those seeking a serene, green outlook every day.

Club House & Amenities

A world-class Club House with gymnasium, banquet hall, community centre, lush green lawn, and indoor games — carom, chess, snooker, and table tennis.

Easy EMI Plan

Book with just 30% down payment and pay the remaining amount in easy installments over 18 months. Registration happens after all installments are completed.

Commercial + Residential

Dual-purpose plots available for both commercial and residential use — giving investors and end-users maximum flexibility and earning potential in one township.

Lifestyle Amenities

Club House

A world-class Club House at the heart of Nature Woods — designed to enrich your lifestyle with recreation, relaxation, and community. Every corner is curated to ensure a harmonious blend of sophistication and fun.

Banquet Hall Grand celebrations & events
Community Centre Community & social gatherings
Lush Green Lawn Relaxation & outdoor events
State-of-the-art Gymnasium Health meets sophistication
Snooker Corner Refined billiards & games
Chess Corner Strategy & intellectual play
Table Tennis Fast-paced energy & fun
Carom Corner Casual play & social fun
How You Pay

Easy EMI Payment Plan

Book your plot today with just 30% down payment and pay the balance comfortably over 18 easy monthly installments.

1

Booking Amount

30% of Plot Value

Secure your chosen plot immediately with the down payment

2

Easy Monthly Installments

Balance in 18 EMIs

Remaining 70% paid in comfortable monthly installments over 1.5 years

3

Plot Registration

After All Installments

Immediate registration upon completion of all installments — your plot is yours

* Payment schedule and installment amounts confirmed at time of booking. Subject to developer's terms & conditions.

Pricing Details

Pricing & PLC

Basic Sale Price (BSP)

Contact Us

Separate price list available

Get Price List

Preferential Location Charges (PLC)

40-Foot Road-Facing Plots 10% of BSP
Corner Plots 10% of BSP
Park-Facing Plots 10% of BSP

GST, stamp duty, registration charges & all government levies payable extra by the purchaser. Price list is for reference and may be revised without prior notice.
